case_title: HEDMAN FURNITURE INC VS. FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEDMAN FURNITURE INC AS TO DEFENDANT FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY WELLS FARGO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE SERVICES INC DOES 1 THROUGH 25, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEDMAN FURNITURE INC SERVED NOV-23-2009, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE SERVICES INC

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO OF CALIFORNIA INSURANCE SERVICES INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION TO PLEAD THE ALLEGED REPRESENTATIONS WITH GREATER SPECIFICITY AS TO WHO MADE THEM, WHEN AND HOW AND TO PLEAD HOW DEFENDANT BREACHED ANY DUTY IT OWED TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
